---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
<p class="hero-name">Dong-Joon Yi</p>
<p class="hero-position">Ph.D. student,</p>
<p class="hero-dept">Department of Electronic Engineering, Hanyang University</p>

<div class="hero-divider"></div>

<p class="hero-lab">Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory,</p>
<p class="hero-lab-dept">Department of Physics, Hanyang University, Republic of Korea</p>
<p class="hero-advisor">(Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong)</p>

<div class="hero-divider"></div>

<p class="hero-contact">
  <span class="contact-label">E-mail</span> : <a href="mailto:iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr">iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr</a> / <a href="mailto:iver.ydj@gmail.com">iver.ydj@gmail.com</a><br>
  <span class="contact-label">Mobile</span> : +82 10 4617 6517<br>
  <span class="contact-label">Google Scholar</span> : <a href="https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=MZE2mWsAAAAJ&hl=ko&oi=ao">scholar.google.co.kr</a><br>
  <span class="contact-label">Full CV</span> : <a href="assets/CV.pdf" download>Download (PDF)</a>
</p>
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Research Interests

<div class="research-keywords">
  <span>Raman / Photoluminescence Spectroscopy</span>
  <span>Tip-Enhanced Nanospectroscopy</span>
  <span>Deep-Level Transient Spectroscopy</span>
  <span>Explainable AI</span>
  <span>Finite-Difference Time-Domain Simulation</span>
</div>
:::
